看过 挽救计划 🌕🌕🌕🌕🌗 好看捏，石好人坏！推荐讨厌整体人类的所有人类观看！ 我之前对外星人电影最大的吐槽就是太人类中心，凭啥觉得像地球生物的才叫生物，碳基生物才是生物，自己的感官太局限就不承认其他生物是生物！ 但人类的作品其实无法避免用人类熟悉的方式呈现，但还是符合我那个理论，创作者是带着对外星人的尊重还是从人类中心的傲慢无知出发很显而易见。 喜欢配乐/话说看过高司令当主角的电影也不少了，但居然是第一次get到他的帅笑死 以及，觉得《降临》书里的外星人应该是这个调调，结果在电影里被搞成了不可名状克苏鲁…… 莫名想起迷宫饭，吃或者被吃……

L’un des deux dit à l’autre, dans une bulle de bande dessinée : “Pire que ça ! Peasholm Park in Scarborough offers a serene LakeView surrounded by lush greenery, where calm waters create stunning WaterReflection on a clear SunnyDay . The historic park, known for its oriental-themed gardens and tranquil boating lake, is a favourite spot for leisurely strolls and family outings. Visitors can enjoy the peaceful OutdoorScenery , with wooded hillsides and gentle cascades adding to the charm of the area. A haven for NaturePhotography , the park’s blend of water, trees, and wildlife makes it a beloved destination for both locals and tourists. Good Morning! Beige be with you :bb: Today is a study day. I may take the laptop downstairs and study on my sofa in the front room where the sun comes in through the window. I won't have my monitor down there, but I think the change of scenery is probably a good thing for my ADHD brain. Maybe I can trick it into thinking that is enough novelty to buckle down and get on with the study. I also need to make a doctors appointment, which means filling out a form online. I hate this, but this is what I must do. If I am ok enough, I will take the dog for a walk. I could do with doing a very short meditation also. This is something I need to get back into the habit of doing, as I definitely cope better with life if I meditate regularly. How is your day looking? GoodMorning BeigeBlessings Today ADHD
